### Post by Sugi on 2009-03-03

#
# This file was generated by dexconf, the Debian X Configuration tool, using

	Identifier	"Generic Keyboard"

	Option		"XkbRules"	"xorg"
	Option		"XkbModel"	"pc105"

Section "Screen"
	Identifier	"Default Screen"
	Monitor		"Configured Monitor"
	Device		"Configured Video Device"
	Defaultdepth	24
	Option		"RenderAccel" "true"

##Here I&#8217;m setting the resolution to the individual monitors.

	Option		"TwinViewOrientation" "Clone"
EndSection

	Identifier	"Default Layout"
  screen "Default Screen"
	Inputdevice	"Synaptics Touchpad"
EndSection
Section "Module"
	Load		"glx"
EndSection

    InputDevice    "kbd" "CoreKeyboard"
    InputDevice    "mouse" "CorePointer"

	Identifier     "StarCraft Screen"

    Gamma           1

EndSection

### Post by Locutus_of_Borg on 2009-03-03
try executing just this:

startx -- :1

### Post by Sugi on 2009-03-04
How so?  Can you explain this a bit more?

> #!/bin/sh
X :1 -layout SCLayout -ac &
XPID=$!
sleep 2
DISPLAY=:1 wine $HOME/.wine/drive_c/\
Program/Files/Starcraft/StarCraft.exe -- /usr/bin/X :1 -layout SCLayout 
sleep 1
kill $XPID
